# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- One-paragraph description of the change. Link the issue it closes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How was this tested?
<!-- pytest, integration test, manual run on real webcam, etc. -->

## Security checklist
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII in code, logs, or commit messages
- [ ] New inputs are validated (see `security/validators.py`)
- [ ] Threat model updated if a new trust boundary is introduced
- [ ] Audit events added for any new authorisation decisions
- [ ] Dependencies scanned (`pip-audit -r requirements.txt`)

## Reviewer notes
<!-- Anything specific to look at — performance trade-offs, ML accuracy deltas, etc. -->
